These accounts provide a mix of official statements and public reactions related to Donald Trump.

items.title: I had a very productive call with Prime Minister Bibi Netanyahu, of Israel, and there will be no Troops going to Beirut,
items.summary:
I had a very productive call with Prime Minister Bibi Netanyahu, of Israel, and there will be no Troops going to Beirut, and any Troops that are on their way, have already been turned back. Likewise, through highly placed Representatives, I had a very good call with Hezbollah, and they agreed that all shooting will stop — That Israel will not attack them, and they will not attack Israel. President DONALD J. TRUMP

( TruthSocial: Jun 1 2026, 1:29 PM ET )​​​‍​​‌‍​​‌‍​​​​​​​‌‍​​​​​​​‌‍​​​​​​​​‌‍​​​​​​​‌‍​‌‍​​​​‌‍​​​​​‌‍​‌‍​​​​​‌‍​​​​​​​​​​‌‍​​​​​​​‌‍​​‌‍​​​​​‌‍​​​​‌‍​‌‍

items.title: 🚨 JUST IN:
items.summary:
🚨 JUST IN:

​Donald Trump:

​"I would have won Vietnam very quickly. I captured Venezuela in 45 minutes."

​Then why did you get a medical exemption to avoid the draft before the Vietnam War? https://t.co/BLmwYAu2P1
